title: Red And Black Shaders
description: A Minecraft Shader that changes everything to black and all the entities to Red.
body:
# ** ARCHIVED **
I am sorry I am giving up on this project since i am working on something better so this project has been archived but
**others are allowed to create their own updated forks / continuations**

![Red & Black Shaders Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f53d71d05374a128061d795e2b29323c43398ca4.png)


Unlike other shader packs, this one stands out by providing visibility through separation of the rendering of the entities from the rest of the world's scenery. As the entire scenery fades into the darkness, the shader makes use of its own red spectrum glow in order to illuminate everything else that is alive, movable, and even thrown at the player.

# **NOTE** 
This Shaders is Mainly for The Minecraft Verison 1.21.9 in the newer verisons its kinda glitchy it will be fixed soon.
also if you find any bugs please report in my discord server.
